task:
Survey the active projects in the Engram harness workspace. Read the following files and return their full text:
1. projects/engram-harness-better-base-demo/ - read GOAL.md, questions.md, SUMMARY.md, and any notes/ files
2. projects/memory-visualization/ - read GOAL.md, questions.md, SUMMARY.md, and any notes/ files
3. projects/psychotechnologies-software/ - read GOAL.md, questions.md, SUMMARY.md
4. notes/ directory listing + read any files there
All paths are under the workspace (not the memory store). Use work_read or read_file as appropriate.
